articles.title: Ethereum Scaling Tool Polygon's MATIC Token Surges Amid Spike in Transactions
articles.description: The token has risen 13% this week and is up 34% for the year. The blockchain has the second most users, according to one research group.

articles.title: FTX Bankruptcy Lawyers Pursue SBF Family in the Hunt For More Assets
articles.description: Lawyers for FTX Hunt Down Potential Bankruptcy Assets from Sam Bankman-Fried's family.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Continues To Shine With 15% Gains In the Last Week
articles.description: Cardano’s native coin ADA has seen many rallies since the start of this year. The token owes its performance to the improving economic condition in the market and the ongoing developments on the Cardano Network. Over the past seven days, ADA has observed more than a 15% price gain in 7 days and an over 17% 14-day gain. But what are the possible reasons for ADA’s impressive performance? Related...

articles.title: Cardano Djed Stablecoin Scores New Listing: Details
articles.description: Launch of Cardano's overcollateralized stablecoin, Djed, is now much closer

articles.title: On-chain activity on Optimism drops after end of NFT incentive program
articles.description: Transaction volumes on Layer 2 network Optimism have dropped 70% following a major spike earlier.

articles.title: Aave set to launch third version of its crypto lending protocol on Ethereum
articles.description: Aave v3 is now live on the Ethereum network following a successful vote by the DAO to launch the DeFi lending protocol.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s Tesla held onto its Bitcoin in Q4 despite market turbulence
articles.description: The EV maker continued to hold its estimated 9,720 Bitcoin, only losing $34 million on its investment due to price declines towards the end of 2022.
